fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the four_wheeler. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Make the wheels roll forward in a smooth motion."
"Create a dynamic jumping gesture over obstacles."
"Perform a quick side‑to‑side shuffle to evade obstacles."

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Adjust gravity to see how it affects the robot's stability."
"Simulate slippery terrain to test traction mechanisms."
"Tune motor forces for realistic acceleration."

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add custom sensors to monitor wheel speed."
"Swap out the chassis design for a more compact shape."
"Integrate a new control script for autonomous navigation."
